name: onedelivery-microservice
description: OneDelivery microservices - Order, Logistics, Payment, Audit

scripts.start:all: concurrently -n order,logistics,payment,audit -c blue,green,magenta,yellow "npm run order:start:dev" "npm run logistics:start:dev" "npm run payment:start:dev" "npm run audit:start:dev"
scripts.start-db: npm run stop-db && docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml up
